zh.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Haynes於1620年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾阿本哈爾時，他的父親Thomas Haynes38歲，母親Agnes Browne38歲。他於大約1637年與Hannah Lambe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德享年26歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Haynes于1620年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾阿本哈爾时，他的父亲Thomas Haynes38岁，母亲Agnes Browne38岁。他于大约1637年与Hannah Lambe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德享年26岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Haynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hayne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s; see Hain . Compare Hains .
English: habitational name from Haynes (Bedfordshire), which may derive from Old English hagenas, plural form of hagen ‘enclosure’.

English: in English counties bordering Wales, perhaps from the Welsh personal name Einws (a pet form of Welsh Einion) with a prosthetic H-; see also Enos . While this is linguistically possible there is no evidence yet to show that it was the origin of the surname.

variants.name: Hains
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique.
English (southwestern): variant of   Haynes   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. Compare   Hance   2 and   Hince   2.

History: Jonathan (Joseph) Haynes, born in MA, was captured in New England by the French at age twelve and taken to QC, Canada, where he married Marie Pauzé in 1712. His descendants bear various altered forms of the surname Haynes, such as Hains, Hance, and Hince.

variants.name: Hayne
meanings: History: Isaac Hayne (1745–81) was an American revolutionary militia officer, executed by the British for breaking parole. He owned an ironworks and was manufacturing ammunition for the American forces when he was caught. His grandfather had emigrated from England to SC c. 1700.

variants.name: Aynes
meanings: English: variant of Haynes with loss of initial H-. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Haines
meanings: English (southern) and Irish (Cork): variant of   Haynes  .

variants.name: Hain
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English heghen, a weak plural of hay, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’, denoting someone who lived at a farm, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word. See also Haynes .

English: from the Middle English personal name Hain, Heyne. Like Deyn this may be a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ) or other names of Norman origin beginning with Rein- such as Reyner and Rainbert. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Hagan .

English: nickname for a wretched individual, from Middle English hain(e), heyne, hayn ‘wretch, niggard’. In some cases however, it is possible that this name derives from a spelling (not a pronunciation) of hi(g)ne ‘servant’ (see Hine ), with the inverted spelling -ey- for i.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Haynes was born in 1620, in Abenhall, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas Haynes, was 38 and his mother, Agnes Browne, was 38. He married Hannah Lambe about 1637, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1646, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 26, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Haynes est né en 1620, à Abenhall, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Haynes, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes Browne, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Lambe environ 1637, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1646, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Er hat um 1637 in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Lambe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Haynes è nato il nel 1620 nel Abenhall, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Haynes, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Browne, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Lambe circa 1637, nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1646, nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Haynesが1620年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアベンハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Haynesは38歳，母Agnes Browneは38歳であった。約1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでHannah Lambeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1646年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドで26歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Haynes(이)가 1620년 영국 그루스스터실르 압홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Haynes(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Browne(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 Hannah Lambe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1646년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Haynes nasceu em 1620, em Abenhall, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Haynes, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Browne, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Lambe aproximadamente 1637, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1646, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Haynes родился в 1620 г. в местности абенолл, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Haynes было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Browne, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Lambe около 1637 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1646 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
